name: FyfeWeb Hosting
notes: For over 10 years, FyfeWeb has been at the forefront of providing ultra-reliable hosting solutions and services. Delivered via our privately owned 100Gbps+ national UK core network, in over 6 UK-based data centres, our services are the perfect fit for any individual or business looking to succeed on the Internet. From affordable, high-quality web hosting services, right up to dedicated servers, virtual servers, and multi-site data centre colocation offerings, we’re able to accommodate almost any hosting requirement.
